steps.title: Use the reason clue
steps.content: The word since introduces the reason the excavation process has the blank quality: it can take weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work to clear away dirt and rock.

steps.title: Match the description
steps.content: A concerns cost, which is not discussed. B means fast, directly contradicting "weeks or even months." D concerns how common the process is, which the passage does not address. A long, physically tiring process is hard or demanding. The answer is C.
